url_pattern_or_url: Mapping rules for the ~50 remaining doorway URLs
reason: Rule 1: Towns within Niagara County (Newfane / Olcott / Burt / Barker etc.) → redirect to /areas-served. Rule 2: Lockport-area towns (Ridgewood / Highland Park / Cambria Center / Pendleton / etc. on ZIP 14094) → redirect to /locations/lockport. Rule 3: Buffalo-metro towns (Williamsville / Cheektowaga / Amherst / Tonawanda / N. Tonawanda) → respective /locations/<town> page. Rule 4: Buffalo proper (any /in-buffalo-ny doorway) → /locations/buffalo (post-BC-04 rewrite). Rule 5: Niagara Falls-area → /locations/niagara-falls (post-LP-08 upgrade). Rule 6: Out-of-region / rural / no anchor match → /areas-served as fallback.
